# PERF-025 negative: key generated once at startup
lang: go
file: PERF-025-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/rsa"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	signingKey  *rsa.PrivateKey
	signingOnce sync.Once
)

func loadSigningKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	signingOnce.Do(func() {
		signingKey, _ = rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
	})
	return signingKey, nil
}

func IssueToken(c *gin.Context) {
	priv, err := loadSigningKey()
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"n": priv.N.String()})
}
